Finding ID: SEC-002
Specialist: Security Auditor
Severity: Important
Confidence: Medium
Source Trust: N/A
File: src/auth/login.py
Lines: 45-52
Title: Hardcoded credentials in authentication module
Evidence: The login function contains a hardcoded password check on line 48 that bypasses the normal authentication flow.
Recommended fix: Remove the hardcoded credential check and use the standard authentication service.
